language.title: Interface Language
language.description: Choose the language for the Aurya interface.

organization.card_desc: Configure name, industry, currency and timezone. These affect KPI display and imports.
organization.name: Organization name
organization.admin_only: Only admins can modify organization settings.

plan.card_desc: Account plan and status. Contact support to change your plan.

security.card_desc: Change your login password. Requires current password for confirmation.
security.must_change_desc: set a new password before continuing. Your current password is temporary.
security.password_hint: Minimum 12 characters with uppercase, lowercase and number.

billing.card_desc: Manage your subscription and billing information.
billing.upgrade_title: Choose the right plan for you
billing.upgrade_desc: Unlock all Aurya features for your organization.
billing.checkout_no_url: No checkout URL returned from the server. Retry or contact support.
billing.checkout_pending: Payment received. Plan activation is in progress — reload in a moment.
billing.past_due_warning: Payment failed. Update your payment method to keep your service active.
billing.read_only_grace: Your plan has been downgraded. You have read-only access for 7 days. Upgrade to restore full access.
billing.fallback_to_free: After this date your plan will revert to Free
billing.redirect_to_portal: You already have an active subscription. Redirecting to billing portal to manage your plan...
billing.trial_expired_banner: Your trial has ended. Subscribe to a plan to continue using premium features.
billing.past_due_expired_banner: Payment failed and your billing period has expired. Update your payment method to restore access.
billing.cancel_modal_desc: You are about to cancel your subscription. Choose how to proceed.
billing.cancel_mode_period_end_desc: Keep access until the period ends, then return to Free.
billing.cancel_mode_period_end_desc_with_date: Keep access until {{date}}, then return to Free. No further charges.
billing.cancel_mode_immediate_desc: Access revoked immediately. No automatic pro-rata refund.
billing.cancel_during_trial_title_with_plan: You're in a free trial of {{plan}}
billing.cancel_during_trial_body: By cancelling now, you'll keep access until the trial ends, then automatically return to Free with no charges.
billing.cancel_during_trial_body_with_date: By cancelling now, you'll keep access until {{date}} (trial end), then automatically return to Free with no charges. No invoice.
billing.confirm_change_during_trial: Your free trial will continue on {{plan}} with no immediate charges.
billing.confirm_change_during_trial_with_date: Your free trial will continue on {{plan}} until {{date}} with no charges.
billing.confirm_change_ends_trial: Changing plans ends your trial and activates {{plan}} immediately. You'll be charged pro-rata for the remaining period.
billing.cancel_reason_placeholder: Help us improve. What led you to cancel?
billing.cancel_pending_toast: Subscription scheduled for cancellation at the end of the period.
billing.cancel_immediate_toast: Subscription canceled. Your plan was downgraded to Free.
billing.reactivate_toast: Subscription reactivated. Cancellation has been undone.
billing.trial_cancelled_until_with_days: Trial cancelled — access until {{date}} ({{days}} days remaining)
billing.plans_footer_trial: The 14-day free trial can only be used once: once activated on a plan, it will not be available on the others.
billing.plans_footer_addons: Need more orders, AI or stores? Add-on packs can be activated after subscribing, from Settings > Billing.

callouts.starter_callout: Full cashflow + smart alerts for your business.
callouts.core_callout: Add online sales (Stripe Connect) to your cashflow.
callouts.pro_callout: Multi-store + unlimited AI to scale across channels.

features.retreat_comms: Automatic pre and post retreat emails
features.retreat_founding_feedback: Direct weekly line with the team
features.retreat_product_types: Sell services, goods, digital and video courses too
features.retreat_unlimited_listings_info: Publish as many retreats and products as you want: no listing limits on the public calendar or your store.
features.retreat_ecommerce_info: A complete online store with your brand: product pages, cart, checkout, coupons and shipping.
features.retreat_product_types_info: Beyond retreats: bookable consultations, physical goods, digital downloads and video courses — all in the same back-office.
features.retreat_public_page_info: Your public showcase on Aurya: photos, bio, languages, verified reviews and your bookable retreats. Indexed on Google in 4 languages.
features.retreat_deposits_payments_info: The customer pays the deposit online and receives links for the balance or instalments: the payment plan runs itself.
features.retreat_payment_reminders_info: Automatic payment schedule: see who owes what and send a WhatsApp or email reminder in one click, message already written.
features.retreat_participants_info: Participant list per retreat with check-in and individual QR passes.
features.retreat_comms_info: Automatic confirmation, pre-retreat reminder and follow-up emails in the customer's language.
features.retreat_newsletter_info: Signup forms to embed anywhere; subscribers land in your CRM with GDPR consent tracked.
features.retreat_cashflow_info: Your treasury: collected, incoming, overdue — including manually recorded income (cash, bank transfers).
features.retreat_customers_info: Customer records with purchase history, segments and re-engagement suggestions.
features.retreat_coupons_info: Percentage or fixed discount codes, with expiry and usage limits.
features.retreat_catalog_100_info: Up to 100 active products in your catalog: plenty to get started.
features.retreat_stores_1_info: One online store with its own dedicated page.
features.retreat_team_2_info: You plus one collaborator, with separate access.
features.retreat_everything_free_info: Every feature of the Free plan, no exceptions.
features.retreat_featured_info: Your retreats appear first in the public calendar among same-date listings, with the ✦ Featured badge on the card.
features.retreat_catalog_unlimited_info: No limit on the number of catalog products.
features.retreat_stores_3_info: Up to 3 online stores: useful for separate brands or projects.
features.retreat_team_5_info: Up to 5 team members with separate access.
features.retreat_priority_support_info: Your requests jump the queue: dedicated channel and priority response.
features.retreat_everything_pro_info: Every feature of the Pro plan, no exceptions.
features.retreat_founding_free_info: Three months of Pro with no fee: the plan reserved for early organizers.
features.retreat_founding_feedback_info: A direct call with the team every week: your feedback drives development.
features.retreat_no_monthly_info: Zero monthly fee: the partner plan is invite-only.

quota.exceeded_body: You've reached your monthly quota of {{limit}} {{metric}} ({{used}}/{{limit}}).
quota.exceeded_helper: Choose how to extend your quota: buy a one-shot add-on pack or upgrade to the next plan.

body_by_feature.chat: You've used all {{limit}} AI chat messages included in your plan this month. Upgrade your plan for more or buy a +50 AI chat pack.
body_by_feature.orders_monthly: You've handled {{used}}/{{limit}} orders this month. Upgrade your plan or buy the '+200 orders' pack to process more.
body_by_feature.data_rows: You've imported {{used}}/{{limit}} data rows this month. Upgrade your plan to import more.
body_by_feature.products: You have {{used}}/{{limit}} products in your catalog limit. Upgrade your plan to create more.
body_by_feature.stores_max: You have {{used}}/{{limit}} stores in your plan limit. Upgrade your plan or add the '+1 store' pack to create more.
body_by_feature.digest: You've used all {{limit}} AI digests included in your plan this month. Upgrade your plan for more.
body_by_feature.team_members: You have {{used}}/{{limit}} team members in your plan. Upgrade your plan to invite more.
body_by_feature.alert_analysis: AI anomaly analysis is not included in your current plan. Upgrade to Commerce Starter to activate it.
body_by_feature.health_explanation: AI Health Score explanations are available from the Commerce Pro plan.

quota.exceeded_helper_with_addon: You can buy an add-on pack to extend the quota immediately, or upgrade to the next plan.

usage.section_subtitle: Quotas for the current period (base plan + active add-ons)
usage.no_metrics: No metrics monitored for this plan.

features_section.title: Plan features
features_section.subtitle: What's active (and what you can unlock with an upgrade)

alert_analysis.label: AI anomaly analysis on alerts
alert_analysis.desc: AI writes root cause + suggested action for every generated alert

health_explanation.label: AI Health Score explanation
health_explanation.desc: 'Explain with AI' button in the Cashflow module for narrative insights

email_alerts.label: Critical email alerts
email_alerts.desc: Automatic email notifications for high-severity anomalies

email_digest.label: Periodic email digest
email_digest.desc: Weekly/monthly report via email (KPI or AI)

export.label: Export CSV / PDF
export.desc: Download data and reports as files

checkout_stripe.label: Native Stripe checkout
checkout_stripe.desc: Sell online with integrated payment (no contact-request)

active_addons.empty: No active add-ons. Visit the plans page to discover them.
active_addons.remove_confirm: Are you sure you want to remove the "{{name}}" pack? Your quota will revert to the base plan limit at the next billing cycle.

addons.section_subtitle: Extend a single metric without upgrading the whole plan. Activated on top of your existing subscription.
addons.buy_confirm: Confirm purchase of "{{name}}" for €{{price}}/month? Proration is billed immediately.
addons.empty_state: No add-ons available for your current plan.

module_paywall.title_module: Module not available on your plan
module_paywall.title_feature: Feature not available on your plan
module_paywall.body: This feature requires a higher plan. Upgrade your plan to get access.
module_paywall.helper: Visit the plans page to compare options and choose the right one for you.

billing.legacy_lock_tooltip: You're paying the original price. When you change plan, this rate is preserved.

retreat.title: Plans and fees
retreat.subtitle: Simple: one plan, one fee on what you collect. No hidden costs.
retreat.fee_free_note: You only pay when you get paid
retreat.stripe_fees_body: Online payments also carry Stripe's processing fees (for European cards ≈ 1.5% + €0.25), charged by Stripe directly on your account: Stripe collects them, not us. They are separate from the platform fee and apply on any plan.
retreat.founding_note: You are on a plan reserved for founding members: everything in Pro, free. Thank you for building the platform with us.
retreat.downgrade_hint: To go back to the Free plan, manage your subscription from the billing portal.
retreat.hero_fee_line: Platform fee {{pct}}% of transactions · Stripe fees are separate (Stripe collects them, not us)

prefs.title: Alert & Report Preferences
prefs.desc: Configure alert sensitivity and report frequency
prefs.upgrade_hint: Upgrade to Solo or higher to configure alert and report preferences.
prefs.upgrade_required: Upgrade to Solo to configure preferences
prefs.cat_locked_hint: Available from Commerce plans — your current plan doesn't manage orders/stores.
prefs.sensitivity_hint: Conservative detects more anomalies. Relaxed only flags significant variations.
prefs.email_digest_hint: Receive the PDF report in your inbox
prefs.digest_day_hint: The report is sent on the morning of the selected day
prefs.categories_hint: Disable categories not relevant to your business
prefs.cat_a_desc: Cash runway, consecutive losses, customer concentration
prefs.cat_d_desc: Year-over-year comparison, trend breaks, weekly anomalies
prefs.cat_g_desc: Customer data coverage, products without cost

account.deactivate_desc: Deactivate your account. You have 30 days to reactivate, after which all data will be permanently deleted.
account.dialog_desc: Enter your password to confirm. After 30 days all data will be permanently deleted.
account.dialog_data_warning: The following will be permanently deleted:
account.dialog_checkbox: I confirm I want to deactivate my account
account.success: Account deactivated. You have 30 days to reactivate.
account.export_desc: Download all your organization data as a ZIP file (GDPR art. 20)

payments.title: Payments
payments.empty_desc: Connect your Stripe account to enable direct checkout.
payments.stripe_connect_locked_hint: Available from the Commerce Starter plan
payments.stripe_connect_locked_body: To accept card payments via Stripe Connect you need the Commerce Starter plan or higher.
payments.express_requirements: Complete the information requested by Stripe
payments.toast_popup_blocked: Popup blocked: opening in the current tab

paymentMethods.title: Payment methods
paymentMethods.description: Status of methods enabled on your provider. To change them, go to the provider's dashboard — the settings reflect back here.

notConnected.title: Stripe not connected
notConnected.body: Connect a Stripe account to accept online payments. Without it, the public checkout is disabled.

error.title: Could not read payment methods
error.body: Unable to reach the payment provider. Please try again in a few minutes.

twintCta.title: Enable TWINT on Stripe for Swiss customers
twintCta.body: TWINT is the most popular payment method in Switzerland. Activation is free and takes 30 seconds on the Stripe dashboard.

card.name: Credit cards
card.hint: Visa, Mastercard, Amex, Apple Pay, Google Pay

twint.name: TWINT
twint.hint: Most-used mobile payment method in Switzerland

publicProfile.title: Public profile
publicProfile.subtitle: Your business-card page in the retreats directory
publicProfile.completenessHint: Photo, bio and socials build trust — and bookings.
publicProfile.bioPlaceholder: Tell who you are and what experiences you create — 2-3 sentences.
publicProfile.showContactsHint: You decide what to expose publicly.
publicProfile.publicNameHint: Shown on the directory, your profile and search engines. It is the same company name as in Settings: changing it here changes it everywhere.
publicProfile.visibilityHint: Impressions, visits and bookings for this profile are in the Visibility page.
publicProfile.taglinePlaceholder: E.g. "Yoga and silence among the olive trees of Ostuni"
publicProfile.galleryHint: Note: removing a photo here requires Save to take effect.
